args.query: SELECT Id, StageName, Name, Amount, Probability, CloseDate FROM Opportunity WHERE TRIM(Id) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO' OR TRIM(REPLACE(Id, '#', '')) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO' LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, StageName, Name, Amount, Probability, CloseDate FROM Opportunity WHERE TRIM(Id) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO' OR TRIM(REPLACE(Id, '#', '')) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO' LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT Id, WhatId, Subject, Status, ActivityDate, Description FROM Task WHERE TRIM(WhatId) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO' OR TRIM(REPLACE(WhatId, '#', '')) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO' ORDER BY ActivityDate;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, WhatId, Subject, Status, ActivityDate, Description FROM Task WHERE TRIM(WhatId) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO' OR TRIM(REPLACE(WhatId, '#', '')) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO' ORDER BY ActivityDate;

args.query: SELECT Id, OpportunityId, Name, Status, CreatedDate FROM Quote WHERE TRIM(OpportunityId) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO' OR TRIM(REPLACE(OpportunityId, '#', '')) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO';
